title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at S.R. Batliboi

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at S.R. Batliboi
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
